tavily.answer: In 2025, the number of internal displacements caused by violence or conflict reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to a report by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. In Spain, a shooting incident in the southern city of El Ejido resulted in at least two deaths and four injuries, while a United Airlines flight from Newark to Palma de Mallorca turned back due to a possible midair security threat. Additionally, Israel has halted humanitarian aid to Gaza until further notice following Iran’s missile attack on Israel and subsequent security measures.
